dos: Use Parchment (#ffffeb) as the dominant background color for light sections and Ink (#1a1a1a) for dark sections to maintain visual rhythm.
Apply EB Garamond for all display and large body headings to convey an academic, sophisticated tone, incorporating its specific letter-spacing values.
Utilize Pale Lavender (#f0d7ff) exclusively for primary call-to-action buttons to ensure consistent highlight for interactive elements.
Apply a 12px border-radius to all buttons and a 32px border-radius to cards, creating a consistent soft-edged aesthetic.
Maintain a comfortable density with generous spacing: 64px for section gaps, 32px for card padding, and an 8px base unit for element gaps.
Offset large typeface headlines with a subtle underline using Pale Lavender (#f0d7ff) to draw attention without excessive weight.
donts: Avoid using harsh, bright whites or pure blacks that would disrupt the soft, muted color palette.
Do not deviate from the specified border-radii; sharp corners will undermine the friendly, approachable aesthetic.
Refrain from heavy drop shadows or excessive elevation, as the design system prioritizes a flat, surface-level presentation.
Do not introduce additional font families; Figtree and EB Garamond provide the necessary range for both functional and expressive text.
Avoid overusing saturated colors; limit Sunburst (#ffa946) and Forest Canopy (#034f46) to functional accents and key sections.
Do not use generic button styles; ensure all interactive elements conform to the Primary, Outline Ghost, or Branded Action Button variants.

colors.name: Parchment
colors.role: Page backgrounds, card surfaces, ghost button backgrounds, default borders — creating a soft, warm canvas

colors.name: Ink
colors.role: Primary text, dark card backgrounds, hero backgrounds, primary borders

colors.name: Forest Canopy
colors.role: Section backgrounds, prominent card backgrounds, active button fills

colors.name: Pale Lavender
colors.role: Primary action button backgrounds, accent underlines for headings

colors.name: Stone
colors.role: Subtle border colors, secondary navigation backgrounds

colors.name: Charcoal Text
colors.role: Secondary text in navigation and neutral buttons

colors.name: Muted Ash
colors.role: Headline text — a softer black for large, elegant typography

colors.name: White
colors.role: Text on dark backgrounds, icon strokes, active badge borders

colors.name: Sunburst
colors.role: Accent badge backgrounds, decorative fills in illustrations

similar.why: Focuses on text refinement, uses a clean, bright aesthetic with a single accent color for primary actions.
AI-powered transcription service with a professional yet accessible visual style, combining light backgrounds with functional accents.
Knowledge management tool with a focus on readability and a serene, academic-leaning design with understated colors.

surfaces.name: Parchment Canvas
surfaces.purpose: Base page background and default light content surfaces.

surfaces.name: Ink Content Block
surfaces.purpose: Prominent dark content sections, hero backgrounds, and featured card surfaces.

surfaces.name: Forest Canopy Feature Block
surfaces.purpose: Distinct, attention-grabbing sections and branded cards.

components.name: Primary Action Button
components.description: Buttons with Pale Lavender (#f0d7ff) background and Ink (#1a1a1a) text, rounded corners at 12px. Used for primary calls to action.

components.name: Outline Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent background with Ink (#222222) border and text, 0px radius. Used for secondary actions that don't need strong emphasis.

components.name: Branded Action Button
components.description: Forest Canopy (#034f46) background with Parchment (#ffffeb) text, 32px radius. Reserved for prominent, section-specific actions.

components.name: Soft Card
components.description: Parchment (#ffffeb) background, 32px padding, 32px border radius. Used for general content grouping on the light canvas.

components.name: Dark Content Card
components.description: Ink (#1a1a1a) background, 70px top-padding, 55px horizontal padding, 40px border radius. Used for featured content and sections on dark backgrounds.

components.name: Subtle Badge
components.description: Transparent background with Ink (#1a1a1a) text and 992px border radius, 11px vertical and 16px horizontal padding. For discrete labeling.

components.name: Branded Badge
components.description: Forest Canopy (#034f46) background with White (#ffffff) text, 1000px border radius, 8px vertical and 16px horizontal padding. For prominent categorization.

typography.role: Body text, UI elements, navigation, buttons, and detailed content — its clean, modern lines provide functional clarity.
Display headings and prominent headlines — chosen for its classic, elegant character that introduces a sophisticated, editorial feel.
Apple Color Emoji — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

designSystem.description: Wispr Flow embraces a serene, almost academic aesthetic, blending a warm, muted palette with classic serif typography for large displays and a modern sans-serif for functional text. The design is characterized by generous spacing and soft, rounded elements that create a friendly and approachable feel. Dark, rich greens and deep grays are used to anchor sections, while a soft lavender provides a playful, yet restrained, accent for interactive elements.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
Quick Color Reference:
text: #1a1a1a
background: #ffffeb
border: #1a1a1a
accent: #f0d7ff
primary action: #f0d7ff (filled action)

3-5 Example Component Prompts:
1. Create a Primary Action Button: #f0d7ff background, #1a1a1a text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use this filled treatment for the main CTA.
2. Design a Dark Content Card: Ink (#1a1a1a) background, 40px border radius, 70px top padding. White (#ffffff) text at 22px Figtree weight 400 for subheadings and 16px for body. Include a white icon using a White (#ffffff) stroke if possible.
3. Implement a Branded Action Button: Forest Canopy (#034f46) background, White (#ffffff) text at 16px Figtree weight 400, 32px radius and 32px padding overall.
4. Create a Section Header: EB Garamond at 64px, Muted Ash (#8a8a80), letter-spacing -0.07em, with a Pale Lavender (#f0d7ff) underline for emphasis.
